items.title: CrowdStrike Launches Falcon OverWatch for Defender
Securing AI in the cloud starts at runtime
items.summary: As AI workloads increasingly move into production, containers and Kubernetes are becoming the foundation for where cloud applications run and where risk becomes real. Preventative controls still matter, but they can’t fully account for runtime behavior, zero-days, lateral movement, or how AI-driven systems behave once they are live.
